inline_comments.message:
1. Please use spaces instead of tabs for indentation.
You can configure your IDE to use ONAP java coding style by importing style configuration
See https://wiki.onap.org/display/DW/Setting+Up+Your+Development+Environment#SettingUpYourDevelopmentEnvironment-ConfigureONAPcheckstyleforIntelliJ

2. If actionResult is null, this method will return Either.left(null)
and that may cause another NullPointerException
because Either.left indicates success.
